title: Geepas 2200W Powerful Hair Dryer – 2-Speed & 3 Temperature Settings – Salon Quality with Cool Shot Function for Frizz Free Shine – Portable Elegant Hair Dryer with Ionic Function – 2 Years Warranty
features: POWERFUL HAIRDRYER - Featuring a powerful 2200 W & ionic conditioning technology, it gives a penetrating air flow with a high shine finish, thus increasing efficiency. It carefully removes the water while protecting the hair from heat giving a controlled and concentrated style that remains still day and night. It has compact design, giving you quick drying results with every use.

IONIC CONDITIONING, CONCENTRATOR NOZZLE FOR SMOOTH STYLING - Produces 90% more ions for a frizz free shine* helping you create a super sleek blow dry with a shine, your hair will look healthy with this dryer. The concentrator nozzle for smooth styling.

2 SPEED AND 3 TEMPERATURE SETTINGS - With variable heat & speed settings, you can tailor blow-dry to your hair type. Finish with the Cool Shot button for ultra-glossy tresses and a style that stays in place all day and night.

COOL SHOT FUNCTION, EASY STORAGE - It gives a cool blow to the hair and is very useful for setting a hairstyle in place. This makes your hairstyle last longer as it does not get dishevelled easily. Hang up hook for easy Storage.

IONIC ACTION TECHNOLOGY, 2-YEARS MANUFACTURER WARRANTY - It helps to tighten the hair cuticles and creates a smooth frizz-free style finish giving a long-lasting result with perfectly straight and dry hair. It works for all types of hair, and the styles are lasting.
description: Product Description POWERFUL PERFORMANCE It has compact design, powerful 1800W hair dryer delivers strong airflow for fast drying and efficient styling. ELEGENT CONCENTRATOR Direct the air where you need the most. EASY PUSH BUTTON CONTROL Finish with the Cool Shot button for ultra-glossy tresses and a style that stays in place all day and night. AIR INLET COVER The air filter cover protects the air filter, avoids being corroded by dirt. FRIZZ- FREE- SHINE Create a super sleek blow dry with a shine, your hair will look healthy with this dryer. FLEXIBILITY It gives a cool blow to the hair and is very useful for setting a hairstyle in place. HANGING LOOP For convenient storage hanging loop also available. TWO SPEED OPTION With variable heat & speed settings, you can tailor blow-dry to your hair type.
